en.title: Florist
en.prompt: Calling out for assistance from knowledgeable personnel with experience of arranging flowers professionally to construct beautiful bouquets which possess pleasing fragrances along with aesthetic appeal as well as staying intact for longer duration according to preferences; not just that but also suggest ideas regarding decorative options presenting modern designs while satisfying customer satisfaction at same time! Requested information -

metaDescription: Need flowers? Compose beautiful, fragrant bouquets. Get modern design ideas and preservation tips for lasting floral arrangements.

faq.q: Does the AI get flower varieties and bloom times wrong?
faq.a: Basic flower knowledge is accurate, but bloom times and origins often don't match Chinese reality. The AI uses Western climate data, and southern versus northern China bloom times differ by 1-2 months. Check availability with local flower markets or professional florists before buying.

faq.q: Can I use the color scheme suggestions directly?
faq.a: Use as a starting point. The AI gives classic palettes (Monet's garden, Chinese New Year red-gold) but can't see your space's lighting or backdrop. Check the palette against your actual space, and swap the primary color if it clashes. Don't follow AI pairings blindly.
